privacy.title: Privacy Policy for GetAIDiscounts.com
privacy.collection_p: We collect your email address only when you voluntarily sign up for our "AI Deal Alerts." We also use cookies via our affiliate partners (Skimlinks and Impact) to track referrals.
privacy.use_p: Your email is used solely to send you AI discount alerts and updates. We never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.tracking_p: We use affiliate tracking cookies from our partners (Impact.com and Skimlinks) to attribute sales and earn commissions when you purchase through our links. These cookies do not store personal identifying information.
privacy.rights_p: You may unsubscribe from our emails at any time using the link in the footer of our newsletters. To request data deletion, contact us at hello@getaidiscounts.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service for GetAIDiscounts.com
terms.aff_p: GetAIDiscounts.com is an affiliate-supported directory. When you click links to third-party tools, your subsequent use of those tools is governed by the terms of service and privacy policies of the destination websites. We are not a party to those agreements.
terms.ng_p: While we strive for 100% accuracy, we do not guarantee that every discount code will work. All codes are provided "as-is" from third-party sources.
terms.tp_p: Our site contains links to external websites. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or actions of these third-party tools.
terms.ll_p: GetAIDiscounts.com and its owners are not liable for any financial decisions or issues arising from the use of the AI tools listed on this site.
terms.acc_p: By using this site, you agree to these terms.

disclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
disclosure.intro: We participate in affiliate programs, including Impact.com and Skimlinks. We may earn a commission when you purchase through our links at no extra cost to you.
disclosure.details: These commissions help us keep the site running, verify deals daily, and add new tools — but a tool's affiliate status never determines whether we list it or how we describe its discount.

request.dialog_desc: Tell us which AI tool you want a discount for. We'll hunt one down and email you when it's live.
request.success: Request received! We'll hunt down a deal.
